grading.pass: normalized answer contains every expected.values token (exact GPIO/setting match); with_skill arm additionally requires a verifiable citation (github url or sha256 fragment)
grading.hallucination: answer asserts a deterministic value listed in conflict_values while NOT stating the correct expected value(s); conflict_values are only populated from real prior evidence (smoke-scorecard forbidden claims), never invented, so tasks without evidence keep hallucination detection unasserted

notes.old6: Migrated from eval/fixtures/smoke-scorecard.json T-Display-S3 tasks. The original smoke tasks were prose/behavioural (Setup206, examples/*.ino); to make grading script-decidable AND fact-pack-aligned each was re-anchored to an exact T-Display-S3 pin fact on the same board/topic. `origin` records the smoke task it descends from.
notes.new6: Blind tasks drawn directly from M33/M34-ingested fact packs; never used in prior dev feedback. Cover LoRa, GNSS, i2c, display, input, power across 4 distinct boards.
notes.conflict_values: Real wrong values a bare model has historically emitted (from smoke-scorecard forbidden_hits). Empty where no evidenced conflict exists.

tasks.prompt: On the LilyGO T-Display-S3, which GPIO pins are the I2C SDA and SCL lines? Give the exact pin numbers.
On the T-Display-S3 the ST7789 LCD uses an 8-bit parallel bus. List the GPIOs for the LCD data lines D0 through D7.
On the T-Display-S3, which GPIOs are the LCD control lines CS, DC, RST, WR and RD?
My T-Display-S3 screen stays dark. Which GPIO controls the LCD backlight, and which GPIO must be held high (PIN_POWER_ON) to keep the board powered?
On the T-Display-S3 factory firmware, which two GPIOs are the user buttons (BOOT/BUTTON1 and BUTTON2)?
On the T-Display-S3, which GPIO / ADC pin reads the battery voltage divider (PIN_BAT_VOLT)?
On the LilyGO T-Beam, the LoRa radio is on SPI. What GPIO is the SPI SCLK, and what GPIO is the radio chip-select (CS/NSS)?
On the T-Beam, the GPS module is on a UART. Which GPIO is the GPS UART RX (into the ESP32) and which is the GPS TX?
On the LilyGO T-Connect-Pro, which GPIOs are the I2C SDA and SCL lines?
On the T-Watch Ultra (CO5300 AMOLED on QSPI), which GPIO is the display CS and which GPIO is the display SCK/CLK?
On the LilyGO T-Deck, which GPIO is the keyboard interrupt (BOARD_KEYBOARD_INT) line?
On the T-Deck, which GPIO must be driven high to power on the board peripherals (BOARD_POWERON)?
